svg.text: JsdocBlock Extended Data — Complete Field Layout
Basic 68 bytes (always present, includes 18B of list metadata after the 8 StringFields) + Compat extension 22 bytes (Header bit0 = 1) = 90 bytes total
Basic part (68 bytes — always present): 8 StringFields + 3 list metadata slots
Compat extension (+22 bytes — only when Header bit0 = 1)

g.text: list metadata (head_index u32 + count u16, 6B per list)
3 bits used (descLines / tags / inlineTags); retained for the visitor framework
delimiter / post_delimiter / terminal / line_end / initial / delim_lb / preterm_lb
↑ basic 68 bytes ↑ ↓ compat extension +22 bytes (Header bit0 = 1) ↓
closing `*/` line index (always present in compat)
first tag or end-line (description boundary), None = 0xFFFFFFFF
2 boolean flags (presence on `*/` line); 2nd field None sentinel = 0xFF
